back_translation: “Do not let your hearts be troubled. Believe in God, and believe in Me also.
In the house of My Father there are many dwelling places. If it were not so, would I have told you that I am going to prepare a dwelling place for you?
And when I have gone and prepared a place for you, I will come back again, and will receive you to be with Me, so that you may be where I am as well.
And you know the way to where I am going.”
Thomas said to Him, “My Lord, we do not know where You are going. So how can we know the way?”
Jesus said to him, “I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.
If you had known Me, you would also have known My Father. From now on, you have known Him and have seen Him.”
Philip said to Him, “My Lord, please reveal the Father to us, and we will be content.”
Jesus said to him, “Philip, I have been with you for so long, and yet you do not know Me? Whoever has seen Me has also seen the Father. How can you say, ‘Reveal the Father to us’?
Do you not believe that I am in the Father, and the Father is in Me? The words I speak to you, I do not speak on My own. But the Father, who dwells in Me, performs His works.
Believe Me when I say that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me. Or if not, then believe because of those works themselves.
Amen, amen, I say to you, the one who believes in Me will do the works that I do, and will do greater things than these as well, because I am going to the Father.
And whatever you ask in My name, I will do, so that the Father may receive glory in the Son.
If you ask anything from Me in My name, I will do it for you.
If you love Me, you will keep My commandments.
And I will request the Father, and He will give you another Helper, to be with you forever,
namely the Spirit of Truth, whom the world cannot receive, because the world neither sees nor knows Him. But you know Him, because He dwells with you, and will be within you.
I will not leave you as orphans. I will come back to you.
A little while longer, and the world will not see Me anymore. But you will see Me. Because I live, you also will live.
On that day you will know that I am in My Father, you are in Me, and I am in you.

The one who has My commandments and keeps them — that one is the one who loves Me. And the one who loves Me will receive love from My Father, and I Myself will love him, and will reveal Myself to him.”
Judas (not Iscariot) said to Him, “My Lord, why is it that You will reveal Yourself to us, but not to the world?”
Jesus answered him, “If anyone loves Me, that one will keep My word, and My Father will love him, and We — the two of Us — will come to him and will make a dwelling with him.
The one who does not love Me does not keep My words. And the word that you hear is not My own, but is the Father's, who sent Me.
These things I have spoken to you while I am still with you.
But the Helper, namely the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in My name, He will teach you all things, and will cause you to remember everything that I have told you.
I leave peace with you. My own peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled, and do not be afraid.
You have heard Me say, ‘I will go away, and I will come back to you.’ If you loved Me, you would rejoice, because I am going to the Father, for the Father is greater than I.
Now I have told you in advance, before the event happens, so that when it happens, you will believe.
I will not speak much more with you, for the ruler of this world is coming. And he has no authority of any kind over Me,
but in order that the world may know that I love the Father, I do as the Father has commanded Me. Rise up, let us go out from here together.”
